TEXT.source: NTU Corpus stories for Saisiyat, story: SaiNr-frog8_parain a _oemaw
TEXT.citation: Sung, L. M., Lily, I., Hsieh, F., & Lin, Z. (2008). Developing an online corpus of Formosan languages. Taiwan Journal of Linguistics, 6(2.).
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @article{sung2008developing,title={Developing an online corpus of Formosan languages.},author={Sung, Li-May and Lily, I and Hsieh, Fuhui and Lin, Zhemin and others},journal={Taiwan Journal of Linguistics},volume={6},number={2},year={2008}}

S.FORM: korkoring kitkita ka 'aehoe'.
S.PHON: korkoriŋ kitkita ka ʔæhœʔ.
S.FORM: korkoring kitkita ka 'aehoe'.
S.PHON: korkoriŋ kitkita ka ʔæhœʔ.
S.TRANSL: 小孩正在看狗.
The child was looking at a dog.

S.FORM: 'ima kitkita ka takem ray binbinisitan 'izo'.
S.PHON: ʔima kitkita ka takəm raj βinβinis~θitan ʔiz~ðoʔ.
S.FORM: 'ima kitkita ka takem ray binbinisitan 'izo'.
S.PHON: ʔima kitkita ka takəm raj βinβinis~θitan ʔiz~ðoʔ.
S.TRANSL: 他正在看容器裡的青蛙.
He was looking at the frog inside the container.

S.FORM: korkoring ma'rem ila.
S.PHON: korkoriŋ maʔrəm ila.
S.FORM: korkoring ma'rem ila.
S.PHON: korkoriŋ maʔrəm ila.
S.TRANSL: 小孩去睡覺了.
The child went to bed.

S.FORM: a takem kas'oehaz inaray binbinisitan kaslatar.
S.PHON: a takəm kas~θʔœhaz~ð inaraj βinβinis~θitan kas~θlatar.
S.FORM: a takem kas'oehaz inaray binbinisitan kaslatar.
S.PHON: a takəm kas~θʔœhaz~ð inaraj βinβinis~θitan kas~θlatar.
S.TRANSL: 青蛙從容器裡出來.
The frog went out of the container.

S.FORM: korkoring 'okik raam ma'rem m'itol kita'en takem 'oka' ila.
S.PHON: korkoriŋ ʔokik raam maʔrəm mʔitol kitaʔən takəm ʔokaʔ ila.
S.FORM: korkoring 'okik raam ma'rem m'itol kita'en takem 'oka' ila.
S.PHON: korkoriŋ ʔokik raam maʔrəm mʔitol kitaʔən takəm ʔokaʔ ila.

TRANSL.notes: 小孩不知道, (當)他起來看, 青蛙不見了.

S.TRANSL: 小孩不知道, 他起來看, 青蛙不見了.
The child did not know and when he got up, the frog was gone.

S.FORM: sia mari' ka haehoeway 'aehae' 'am sbet ka 'aehoe'.
S.PHON: s~θia mariʔ ka hæhœwaj ʔæhæʔ ʔam s~θβət ka ʔæhœʔ.
S.FORM: sia mari' ka haehoeway 'aehae' 'am sbet ka 'aehoe'.
S.PHON: s~θia mariʔ ka hæhœwaj ʔæhæʔ ʔam s~θβət ka ʔæhœʔ.
S.TRANSL: 他拿一個鞋子要打狗.
He took one shoe to beat the dog.

S.FORM: 'aehoe' moiti' ray moiti' ray binbinisitan 'izo' ka ta'oeloeh.
S.PHON: ʔæhœʔ moitiʔ raj moitiʔ raj βinβinis~θitan ʔiz~ðoʔ ka taʔœlœh.
S.FORM: 'aehoe' moiti' ray moiti' ray binbinisitan 'izo' ka ta'oeloeh.
S.PHON: ʔæhœʔ moitiʔ raj moitiʔ raj βinβinis~θitan ʔiz~ðoʔ ka taʔœlœh.
S.TRANSL: 狗把它的頭鑽到容器裡.
The dog stuck its head inside the container.

S.FORM: sia haewaeh ka hinoehas 'aehoe' raiw ila tkaw ilaila.
S.PHON: s~θia hæwæh ka hinœhas~θ ʔæhœʔ raiw ila tkaw ilaila.
S.FORM: sia haewaeh ka hinoehas 'aehoe' raiw ila tkaw ilaila.
S.PHON: s~θia hæwæh ka hinœhas~θ ʔæhœʔ raiw ila tkaw ilaila.
S.TRANSL: 他打開窗戶, 狗跳出去了.
He opened the window and the dog jumped away.

S.FORM: rima' noka korkoring rakepen 'aehoe' aewpoe'oen mwai' ray taew'an.
S.PHON: rimaʔ noka korkoriŋ rakəpən ʔæhœʔ æwpœʔœn mwaiʔ raj tæwʔan.
S.FORM: rima' noka korkoring rakepen 'aehoe' aewpoe'oen mwai' ray taew'an.
S.PHON: rimaʔ noka korkoriŋ rakəpən ʔæhœʔ æwpœʔœn mwaiʔ raj tæwʔan.
S.TRANSL: 他抓住狗帶他到屋子裡.
He caught the dog and carried it into the house.

S.FORM: 'oe'oe ila 'oe'oe ila si'oe'oe hini kabih.
S.PHON: ʔœʔœ ila ʔœʔœ ila s~θiʔœʔœ hini kaβih.
S.FORM: 'oe'oe ila 'oe'oe ila si'oe'oe hini kabih.
S.PHON: ʔœʔœ ila ʔœʔœ ila s~θiʔœʔœ hini kaβih.
S.TRANSL: 他往四處一直叫.
He kept calling in every direction.

S.FORM: hayza ka boya' boya' mwai' hayap ray korkoring ki 'aehoe'.
S.PHON: hajz~ða ka βojaʔ βojaʔ mwaiʔ hajap raj korkoriŋ ki ʔæhœʔ.
S.FORM: hayza ka boya' boya' mwai' hayap ray korkoring ki 'aehoe'.
S.PHON: hajz~ða ka βojaʔ βojaʔ mwaiʔ hajap raj korkoriŋ ki ʔæhœʔ.
S.TRANSL: 有蜂飛往小孩和狗.
There were bees flying toward the boy and the dog.

S.FORM: 'aehoe' rima' tobong ka boya'.
S.PHON: ʔæhœʔ rimaʔ toβoŋ ka βojaʔ.
S.FORM: 'aehoe' rima' tobong ka boya'.
S.PHON: ʔæhœʔ rimaʔ toβoŋ ka βojaʔ.
S.TRANSL: 狗對著蜂窩吠叫.
The dog barked at the bees.

S.FORM: korkoring masroko' isaa korkoring asengen noka boya'.
S.PHON: korkoriŋ mas~θrokoʔ is~θaa korkoriŋ as~θəŋən noka βojaʔ.
S.FORM: korkoring masroko' isaa korkoring asengen noka boya'.
S.PHON: korkoriŋ mas~θrokoʔ is~θaa korkoriŋ as~θəŋən noka βojaʔ.
S.TRANSL: 小孩彎下腰, 蜂在叮他.
The child bent down and the bees were biting him.

S.FORM: hini 'aehoe' yo tobong lalenges lalengesen boya' kas'oehaz ila saboeh.
S.PHON: hini ʔæhœʔ jo toβoŋ laləŋəs~θ laləŋəs~θən βojaʔ kas~θʔœhaz~ð ila s~θaβœh.
S.FORM: hini 'aehoe' yo tobong lalenges lalengesen boya' kas'oehaz ila saboeh.
S.PHON: hini ʔæhœʔ jo toβoŋ laləŋəs~θ laləŋəs~θən βojaʔ kas~θʔœhaz~ð ila s~θaβœh.

TRANSL.notes: 狗對著蜂窩吠(而且)搖(樹), 搖一搖蜂全部都跑出來了.

S.TRANSL: 狗對著蜂窩吠 搖 , 搖一搖蜂全部都跑出來了.
The dog barked and shook the hive and the bees all came out.

S.FORM: hini takem ma' tikot ila.
S.PHON: hini takəm maʔ tikot ila.
S.FORM: hini takem ma' tikot ila.
S.PHON: hini takəm maʔ tikot ila.
S.TRANSL: 青蛙也害怕
The frog got afraid.

S.FORM: korkoring rima' raiw ray kaehoey babaw hayza ka roro'.
S.PHON: korkoriŋ rimaʔ raiw raj kæhœj βaβaw hajz~ða ka roroʔ.
S.FORM: korkoring rima' raiw ray kaehoey babaw hayza ka roro'.
S.PHON: korkoriŋ rimaʔ raiw raj kæhœj βaβaw hajz~ða ka roroʔ.
S.TRANSL: 小孩離開, 爬上有樹洞的樹頂.
The child left and climbed on top of the tree where there was a hole.

S.FORM: ray roro' 'izo' hayza ka 'oewi'.
S.PHON: raj roroʔ ʔiz~ðoʔ hajz~ða ka ʔœwiʔ.
S.FORM: ray roro' 'izo' hayza ka 'oewi'.
S.PHON: raj roroʔ ʔiz~ðoʔ hajz~ða ka ʔœwiʔ.
S.TRANSL: 洞裡有貓頭鷹.
There was an owl inside the hole.

S.FORM: kas'oehaz korkoring homses.
S.PHON: kas~θʔœhaz~ð korkoriŋ homs~θəs~θ.
S.FORM: kas'oehaz korkoring homses.
S.PHON: kas~θʔœhaz~ð korkoriŋ homs~θəs~θ.
S.TRANSL: 貓頭鷹出來, 小孩嚇一跳.
The owl got out and the child got surprised.

S.FORM: maykonkonay sahae' ra ray rai'.
S.PHON: majkonkonaj s~θahæʔ ra raj raiʔ.
S.FORM: maykonkonay sahae' ra ray rai'.
S.PHON: majkonkonaj s~θahæʔ ra raj raiʔ.
S.TRANSL: 小孩滾下來.
The child fell down rolling.

S.FORM: 'aehoe' noka boya' sowawen ila.
S.PHON: ʔæhœʔ noka βojaʔ s~θowawən ila.
S.FORM: 'aehoe' noka boya' sowawen ila.
S.PHON: ʔæhœʔ noka βojaʔ s~θowawən ila.
S.TRANSL: 蜜蜂正在追狗.
The bees were chasing the dog.

S.FORM: hini ko korkoring yo kababawawen noka 'oewi'.
S.PHON: hini ko korkoriŋ jo kaβaβawawən noka ʔœwiʔ.
S.FORM: hini ko korkoring yo kababawawen noka 'oewi'.
S.PHON: hini ko korkoriŋ jo kaβaβawawən noka ʔœwiʔ.
S.TRANSL: 貓頭鷹在小孩上面盤旋.
The owl was hovering over the child.

S.FORM: korkoring rima' tai'itol ray bato' babaw.
S.PHON: korkoriŋ rimaʔ taiʔitol raj βatoʔ βaβaw.
S.FORM: korkoring rima' tai'itol ray bato' babaw.
S.PHON: korkoriŋ rimaʔ taiʔitol raj βatoʔ βaβaw.
S.TRANSL: 小孩爬到石頭上面.
The child climbed on top of a rock.

S.FORM: hayza ka wae'ae'.
S.PHON: hajz~ða ka wæʔæʔ.
S.FORM: hayza ka wae'ae'.
S.PHON: hajz~ða ka wæʔæʔ.
S.TRANSL: 有鹿.
There was a deer.

S.FORM: ri'sa pakomoSa pakomoSa kaehoey nisia tikama'en ka kaeh'oeng.
S.PHON: riʔs~θa pakomoʃa pakomoʃa kæhœj nis~θia tikamaʔən ka kæhʔœŋ.
S.FORM: ri'sa pakomoSa pakomoSa kaehoey nisia tikama'en ka kaeh'oeng.
S.PHON: riʔs~θa pakomoʃa pakomoʃa kæhœj nis~θia tikamaʔən ka kæhʔœŋ.
S.TRANSL: 小孩抓住鹿角, 誤以為是樹枝
The child grabbed on a tree branch which turned out to be the deer's antler.

S.FORM: noka wae'ae' si'in'itol sia hoe'oengen kibabawen ray ta'oeloeh pa'ae'aeaew ila.
S.PHON: noka wæʔæʔ s~θiʔinʔitol s~θia hœʔœŋən kiβaβawən raj taʔœlœh paʔæʔææw ila.
S.FORM: noka wae'ae' si'in'itol sia hoe'oengen kibabawen ray ta'oeloeh pa'ae'aeaew ila.
S.PHON: noka wæʔæʔ s~θiʔinʔitol s~θia hœʔœŋən kiβaβawən raj taʔœlœh paʔæʔææw ila.
S.TRANSL: 鹿把他頂在頭上, 然後跑走了.
The deer lifted him over its head and ran away.

S.FORM: 'aehoe' ma' tobong ila ma'oenhael raiw ila.
S.PHON: ʔæhœʔ maʔ toβoŋ ila maʔœnhæl raiw ila.
S.FORM: 'aehoe' ma' tobong ila ma'oenhael raiw ila.
S.PHON: ʔæhœʔ maʔ toβoŋ ila maʔœnhæl raiw ila.
S.TRANSL: 狗也在吠, 然後一起跑走了.
The dog also barked and they left together.

S.FORM: rima' nisia noka wae'ae' paksahae'en ray 'ataS ila hini kamasal.
S.PHON: rimaʔ nis~θia noka wæʔæʔ paks~θahæʔən raj ʔataʃ ila hini kamas~θal.
S.FORM: rima' nisia noka wae'ae' paksahae'en ray 'ataS ila hini kamasal.
S.PHON: rimaʔ nis~θia noka wæʔæʔ paks~θahæʔən raj ʔataʃ ila hini kamas~θal.
S.TRANSL: 鹿把他們帶到懸崖上, 把他們丟下去.
The deer took them to a cliff where it threw them over.

S.FORM: mae'iyaeh ki 'aehoe' sahae' ila o rima' potngor ray wasal.
S.PHON: mæʔijæh ki ʔæhœʔ s~θahæʔ ila o rimaʔ potŋor raj was~θal.
S.FORM: mae'iyaeh ki 'aehoe' sahae' ila o rima' potngor ray wasal.
S.PHON: mæʔijæh ki ʔæhœʔ s~θahæʔ ila o rimaʔ potŋor raj was~θal.
S.TRANSL: 小孩和狗都被丟到水裡.
Both the boy and the dog fell into the water.

S.FORM: mae'iyaeh minsa'la'.
S.PHON: mæʔijæh mins~θaʔlaʔ.
S.FORM: mae'iyaeh minsa'la'.
S.PHON: mæʔijæh mins~θaʔlaʔ.
S.TRANSL: 小孩先,
The boy first,

S.FORM: 'aehoe' maybiil.
S.PHON: ʔæhœʔ majβiil.
S.FORM: 'aehoe' maybiil.
S.PHON: ʔæhœʔ majβiil.
S.TRANSL: 再來是狗.
The dog followed.

S.FORM: nisia 'aewpoe'oen ka 'aehoe'.
S.PHON: nis~θia ʔæwpœʔœn ka ʔæhœʔ.
S.FORM: nisia 'aewpoe'oen ka 'aehoe'.
S.PHON: nis~θia ʔæwpœʔœn ka ʔæhœʔ.
S.TRANSL: 他帶著狗.
He carried the dog.

S.FORM: sikas'oemaeh ila kas'oemaeh ila.
S.PHON: s~θikas~θʔœmæh ila kas~θʔœmæh ila.
S.FORM: sikas'oemaeh ila kas'oemaeh ila.
S.PHON: s~θikas~θʔœmæh ila kas~θʔœmæh ila.
S.TRANSL: 他們往岸邊移動.
They moved toward the land.

S.FORM: 'aehoe' palangoyon amaray horok 'am kababaw.
S.PHON: ʔæhœʔ palaŋojon amaraj horok ʔam kaβaβaw.
S.FORM: 'aehoe' palangoyon amaray horok 'am kababaw.
S.PHON: ʔæhœʔ palaŋojon amaraj horok ʔam kaβaβaw.

TRANSL.notes: 狗(在小孩肩上)游泳上岸.

S.TRANSL: 狗 游泳上岸.
The dog swam and moved over the ground.

S.FORM: korkoring koSa saksakaw.
S.PHON: korkoriŋ koʃa s~θaks~θakaw.
S.FORM: korkoring koSa saksakaw.
S.PHON: korkoriŋ koʃa s~θaks~θakaw.
S.TRANSL: 小孩叫狗安靜.
The child told the dog to move silently.

S.FORM: lasia saksakaw maray maray roro' babaw onkosa'en ila o kita'en hayza' ka takem roSa' riza.
S.PHON: las~θia s~θaks~θakaw maraj maraj roroʔ βaβaw onkos~θaʔən ila o kitaʔən hajz~ðaʔ ka takəm roʃaʔ riz~ða.
S.FORM: lasia saksakaw maray maray roro' babaw onkosa'en ila o kita'en hayza' ka takem roSa' riza.
S.PHON: las~θia s~θaks~θakaw maraj maraj roroʔ βaβaw onkos~θaʔən ila o kitaʔən hajz~ðaʔ ka takəm roʃaʔ riz~ða.
S.TRANSL: 他們輕輕地穿過洞, 然後看到兩隻青蛙.
They moved slowly through the hole and saw two frogs.

S.FORM: sia kita' ka takem hiza honay babaw.
S.PHON: s~θia kitaʔ ka takəm hiz~ða honaj βaβaw.
S.FORM: sia kita' ka takem hiza honay babaw.
S.PHON: s~θia kitaʔ ka takəm hiz~ða honaj βaβaw.
S.TRANSL: 他看到青蛙在那上面.
He saw the frog there on top.

S.FORM: kita' saksaakaw raiw ila paraiw ila ilahato noka 'aehoe' ki korkoring.
S.PHON: kitaʔ s~θaks~θaakaw raiw ila paraiw ila ilahato noka ʔæhœʔ ki korkoriŋ.
S.FORM: kita' saksaakaw raiw ila paraiw ila ilahato noka 'aehoe' ki korkoring.
S.PHON: kitaʔ s~θaks~θaakaw raiw ila paraiw ila ilahato noka ʔæhœʔ ki korkoriŋ.
S.TRANSL: 小孩和狗輕輕地離開.
The boy and the dog left slowly.

S.FORM: hiza takem ray roro' babaw 'ima sazeez 'ima sazeez 'oka' ila.
S.PHON: hiz~ða takəm raj roroʔ βaβaw ʔima s~θaz~ðəəz~ð ʔima s~θaz~ðəəz~ð ʔokaʔ ila.
S.FORM: hiza takem ray roro' babaw 'ima sazeez 'ima sazeez 'oka' ila.
S.PHON: hiz~ða takəm raj roroʔ βaβaw ʔima s~θaz~ðəəz~ð ʔima s~θaz~ðəəz~ð ʔokaʔ ila.
S.TRANSL: 小孩在洞上面一直瞪著看.
The frogs on top of the hole kept on staring them.
